ogTitle: Dooen vs Dookie College: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dooen and Dookie College.
heading: Dooen vs Dookie College — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dooen, Victoria and Dookie College, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dookie College has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Dooen (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dooen or Dookie College safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dooen has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Dookie College scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dooen scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Dookie College scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dooen or Dookie College?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dookie College has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
